nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Lactobacillus/Propionibacterium/Lactose/Lemon Fruit/Fig Fruit/ Date Fruit/ Walnut Nut/Soybean/Onion Bulb/ Coconut Fruit/Celery Bulb/Vignus Radiata Sprout/Artichoke Buds/Millet Seed/Pea Pod Ferment Filtrate
chemicalDescription: This is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of Lactose (q.v.), the fruit of Citrus limon (lemon), Ficus carica (fig), Phoenix dactylifera (date), Juglans regia (walnut) and Cocos nucifera (coconut); the seeds of Glycine max (soybean) and Panicum miliaceum (millet); the bulbs of Allium cepa (onion) and Apium graveolens (celery); the sprouts of Vignus radiata; the buds of Cynara scolymus (artichoke); and the pods of Pisum sativum (pea), by the microorganisms, Lactobacillus and Propionibacterium.
inciName: LACTOBACILLUS/PROPIONIBACTERIUM/LACTOSE/LEMON FRUIT/FIG FRUIT/ DATE FRUIT/ WALNUT NUT/SOYBEAN/ONION BULB/ COCONUT FRUIT/CELERY BULB/VIGNUS RADIATA SPROUT/ARTICHOKE BUDS/MILLET SEED/PEA POD FERMENT FILTRATE
